scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/rbxts-transform-boost build && bun run --cwd packages/rbxts-transform-luau build
scripts.bench:roblox-ts: bun run build && cd bench/roblox-ts && bunx rbxtsc -p tsconfig.json && bunx rbxtsc -p tsconfig.notransform.json && rojo build default.project.json -o benchmark.rbxlx
scripts.bench:rotor: bun run build && cd bench/rotor && rotor build -p tsconfig.json && rotor build -p tsconfig.notransform.json && rojo build default.project.json -o benchmark.rbxlx
